item.title: Posting for a request comment
item.dc:creator: NotDannyDevito

item.title: Depressing memes for a depressing day
item.description:
I'm scared. Honestly terrified
I keep breaking down on and off this morning. I’m disabled, female, and bisexual. I have a laundry list of mental and physical health struggles that have been making my daily life a living hell- and now I’m worried that new laws are going to make it worse.
I know there's nothing I can do, that I already did everything I could by voting and encouraging everyone I could to vote- but that doesn't help with the outcome.
I feel so helpless and hopeless.
item.dc:creator: AbjectFun

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have to. Wednesday random meme dump for these trying times
item.description:
It's a TRAP
Thank you for making it all the way trough! As a final post I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky Stanely Parable-like game called Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse). Please wishlist the game on Steam it would help a lot: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/

make that until Janurary
May I also add? https://signal.org/: For messaging https://www.torproject.org/: For private browsing Shit'll get rocky
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
Yeah
m e t a
Everyone in the world when they woke up this morning.
I mean, basically
everyday is suffering
A lot of trump supporters voted to make the lives of some people worse, rather than their lives better.
the creechur

item.title: Don't forget to bring a towel
item.dc:creator: FredGarvinMaleProstitute

item.title: I feel empty inside.
item.description: I had decided I wanted to transition about a year ago. It took a long time to realize and accept that it was what I wanted, what I needed. I just got a job that offered benefits, benefits that I could use to start transitioning. I had a new name, it sounded right, it felt right, it was me. I was practicing my voice, I still needed a lot of work, but I was happy with the progress. I knew I needed to do this. I hated what I saw in the mirror everyday. I didn't care about my body because I didn't want it. So much about me felt wrong and it fuelled my depression, I was so close to ending it all. I had hope for the first time in a long time, now it's gone. Now all I can do is decide how it all ends, if I even get to do that.
item.dc:creator: Draxx127

item.title: Whether wild or domesticated, a cat’s gonna cat.
item.dc:creator: Sonflooki

item.title: Jason has a big fat belly
item.description: Foster kitten Jason came to me a few weeks ago as a skinny, not-eating, diarrhea-having baby. After a couple of weeks of medication, subcutaneous fluids, and worry - he has turned into one of those delicious fat-bellied kittens that you can hold and snuggle. I am obsessed with him.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Meaningless
item.description: I am not a sucker or a loser. My brothers and sisters in arms, fallen or not, are not suckers and losers. With Veterans Day coming up I sincerely hope that I get a lot of that degenerate pile of shits supporters thanking me for my service because they're going to get an earful.
item.dc:creator: Wardonk3y

item.title: The CIA'S simple sabotage manual
item.description:
Apropo of nothing, I just wanted to share. https://www.cia.gov/static/5c875f3ec660e092cf893f60b4a288df/SimpleSabotage.pdf
Finite and Infinite Games
Debt, By David Graeber
Other fun reading is "Recapture the Rapture", a book about how the rich acknowledge the world is ending and have focused their efforts on taking as much as they can and figuring out how to control their private armies when money is meaningless. Also about SEX, DRUGS, and ROCK AND ROLL.
item.dc:creator: BenArowndaBlok

item.title: A (non-political) Dump
item.description:
This is already my vibe in Colorado
I broke nail biting but I have the rest
Love sneks
I love it
I love her
This IS a night light and I'll fight over it
And my bestie will TOTALLY die before me, he's already had at least 2 near death experiences
I'm so sorry (not sorry) I subjected y'all to this
I have one in particular in mind
This is my Jack, he loves plastic bags
Love snek beeps
I have these boots without wheels and I'm wondering if I can DIY
August (doggo) and Jack (kitty) having their first known moment
Our ducks Bruno Tiny Duckington and Daisy Duckington enjoying the snow

item.title: Get Some Sleep
item.dc:creator: junejujube

item.title: It's hard to say goodbye
item.description: I only came back onto imgur because I remembered I had some photos of my boy. It's hard to watch his last final moments and it hurts so bad. I love you Kiki. You were my son. You fought that cancer and proved the vet wrong. 4 years and I knew you could fight for more time but you told me and your mom it was time. I'm venting to strangers because I'm tired of people saying sorry. I can't stop crying because I miss you Kiki. My hunter and cuddle buddy. Other than your mom, I loved you and was happy you've grown to be a big boy. You fought when the odds weren't in your favor for 11 years. Even became the neighbor defender. The pain and the memories will still be with me but I will make sure your brothers are taken care of. Goodbye my beautiful son. Keep catching those birds for me in your next life. <3
item.dc:creator: Kamininja
